name: Loomis Editorial Docs
description: Editorial Mentor docs theme. Warm paper-and-ink palette, Lora display + Outfit body, grouped colored sidebar, command-palette search, deep-paper dark mode.

brand_word.title: Brand wordmark
brand_word.description: Wordmark shown in sidebar and mobile top bar.

version_label.title: Version label
version_label.description: Small version chip next to the wordmark in the desktop header.

github_url.title: GitHub URL
github_url.description: Optional GitHub link in the header.

edit_url_base.title: Edit page URL base
edit_url_base.description: Optional base URL prefixed onto each page's source_markdown_url to render an Edit on GitHub link. Example: https://github.com/owner/repo/edit/main/documents
